title: Heart Canisters
body:
[![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) [![fabric-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [![github](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/BoyPika/heartcanister)

[![quilt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/quilt_vector.svg)](https://quiltmc.org/en/install/client/) [![quilted-fabric-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/quilted-fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)

Here's yet another mod to add the heart canisters from Tinkers' Construct

This mod simply uses Trinkets to add the slots needed to use the canisters.

Each canister, despite the color of heart, adds 1 health. The hearts can only be found in either dungeon loot or nether fortress loot, depending on the color of the heart

### Look at the wiki for the all of the recipes
